Блок1-05 Таунхаус за выходные.scriptText:
Между квартирой и коттеджем есть третий вариант.

Современные таунхаусы вырастают в ряд.

У каждого — свой вход и свой дворик.

Газоны, парковка, деревья — благоустройство готово.

Своя земля — с торгов. Торги Земли.
Блок1-05 Таунхаус за выходные.whiskPrompts:
Aerial view of an empty prepared land strip for a townhouse row, surveyor pegs, golden hour, modern premium Russian suburb, scenic hills behind, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
Construction time-lapse frame: a row of modern two-story townhouses with dark metal roofs and wood-brick facades rising along a new street, each townhouse has a SPACIOUS private front yard with a neat low wooden fence separating the plots, wide green lawns, golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The SAME row of finished modern townhouses: each with its own entrance and its own LARGE fenced front yard (low wooden fences between plots), wide sidewalks along the road, each townhouse has a SPACIOUS private front yard with a neat low wooden fence separating the plots, wide green lawns, golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The SAME townhouse street fully landscaped: green lawns, young trees, parked cars in driveways, WIDE SIDEWALKS on both sides of the road, families and children playing INSIDE their fenced yards and walking on the sidewalks — NOBODY on the road itself, the road is clear, each townhouse has a SPACIOUS private front yard with a neat low wooden fence separating the plots, wide green lawns, golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
High aerial pull-back over the SAME townhouse street at sunset, warm lights in windows, people only in yards and on sidewalks, road clear of pedestrians, scenic hills behind, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
